title: CATC 2026 at NITK Surathkal Commenced
summary: Cadets of Manipal Jnanasudha from the 6 Kar Naval Unit joined approximately 555 NCC cadets at the NITK Surathkal campus for the official commencement of the 10 day Combined Annual Training Camp (CATC MLORE-11), uniting nine different wings and battalions under the NCC Group Headquarters, Mangaluru.

title: CATC 2026 at NITK Surathkal Concluded
summary: The 10-day camp successfully concluded following intensive training in drills, weapon handling and a specialized cyber safety module by NITK Staff. The collaborative training provided 6 Kar Naval Unit cadets with critical physical fitness and safety skills alongside multiple wings from the Mangaluru Group.
